case_title: ANITA SAULNY-GREEN VS. APPLAUSE INC. et al.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-21-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
(SC-150) FORM USED FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-23-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA
TRIAL RESET TO APR-06-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-10-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NICOLE D SHAW-OWENS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO AUG-13-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICOLE SHAW-OWENS. DEFENDANT NICOLE SHAW-OWENS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC. SHAW-OWENS, NICOLE D
DECLARATION OF ANTIA SAULNY-GREEN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (506/JR)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC. SHAW-OWENS, NICOLE D $9,503.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,608.00, DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S COSTS AND IRS TAX LIABILITY FOR 2016, BECAUSE OF DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PROPERLY PREPARE AND FILE PLAINTIFF'S TAXES. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ENTITLED FOR LOSS OF WAGES AND REFUND OF FEES PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER VACATING THE DISMISSAL OF AUGUST 21, 2019. CLERICAL ERROR. COURT DATES REMAINS AS SET FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 10:00 A.M.
NOTICE OF SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW-OWENS, NICOLE D
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW-OWENS, NICOLE D HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEFENDANT NICOLE SHAW-OWENS STATES THAT APPLAUSE INC. NO LONGER EXISTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION OF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED MAR-02-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPLAUSE, INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICOLE D. SHAW-OWENS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,588.00 FILED BY SAULNY-GREEN, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-10-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW-OWENS, NICOLE D ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON MOTION TO VACATE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICOLE SHAW IS PRESENT. CASE AGAINST APPLAUSE INC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT A PREVIOUS HEARING. DEFENDANT PRESENTED A CASHIERS CHECK FOR $1000 AND A BOX OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DOCUMENTS AS OUTLINED IN THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXCEPTED CHECK AND DOCUMENTS AS WITNESSED BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER FOR MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED AND CASE IS CONTINUED - FOR HEARING.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-15-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANITA SAULNY-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPLAUSE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICOLE SHAW. DEFENDANT NICOLE SHAW-OWENS AS AN INDIVIDUAL IS PRESENT. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST APPLAUSE INC. THE COURT HEARS THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT NICOLE SHAW-OWENS AS AN INDIVIDUAL. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT: DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $1000 TO THE PLAINTIFF AND RETURN ALL OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DOCUMENTS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-15TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
